events.fact: The player creates a character named Conrad.
A new world named Terra Conrad is generated using a random seed.
A Valkyrie carries the character into the world of Valheim.
The character arrives in the Meadows biome.
The character encounters Hugin the raven for the first time.
The character discovers a Vegvisir stone indicating the location of the first boss, Eikthyr.
The character crafts a wooden club.
The character kills a boar and collects leather scraps.
The character crafts a stone axe.
The character discovers Eikthyr's sacrificial altar.
The character kills a Greyling and collects resin.
The character crafts a hammer, unlocking building capabilities.
The character builds a campfire to deter enemies and provide warmth.
The character builds a bed inside a basic wooden structure.
The character sets a spawn point and sleeps through the first night.
The character gains the Rested buff for the first time.
